backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages contact form submissions, storing messages in a map with auto-incrementing IDs and exposing submit, get-all, and get-by-id query/update methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping each portfolio website feature (Hero, Services, About, Portfolio, Pricing, etc.) to their implementing source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and content of each component, hook, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color roles.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Data Analyst Portfolio Website' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the full single-page portfolio layout by composing Navbar, Hero, About, Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Testimonials, Contact, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About Me section rendering a profile avatar, professional bio, skill badges, and a tools/technologies grid with SI brand icons and a Lucide fallback for Excel.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a validated four-field form that submits messages to the backend via the useSubmitContactMessage hook, showing inline errors and a success confirmation state.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, bio blurb, social icon links, quick navigation links, a services list, and a copyright/attribution row.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section for a data analyst portfolio with animated entrance, background image/grid overlay, tagline, skill list, and CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to other sections.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware background blur, smooth-scroll anchor links, a 'Hire Me' CTA button, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/Portfolio.tsx: Portfolio section displaying three featured data analytics projects in a card grid, each with a thumbnail image, category/impact badges, tool tags, and placeholder GitHub/external-link icons.
frontend/src/components/Pricing.tsx: Pricing section with three tiered plans (Basic, Standard, Premium) rendered as cards, where the Standard plan is visually highlighted and all CTAs scroll to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section listing eight data analytics offerings in a responsive grid, each card showing an icon, title, description, and relevant tool tags with a hover accent effect.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a carousel of five client testimonials with star ratings, quotes, and client info on a dark navy background. Uses the shadcn Carousel component with lucide-react icons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitContactMessage mutation hook that calls the backend actor's submitContactMessage method and invalidates the contactMessages query on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, defines Tailwind base/component/utility layers, sets CSS custom properties for the dark navy/teal color theme, and declares utility classes for glows, grid backgrounds, and fade-in animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk, JetBrains Mono), oklch-based color tokens (teal, navy, chart colors), custom shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state including version, summary, architectural notes, existing features, and image requirements for a professional data analyst portfolio website built on ICP.
